data.name: 《我與她（護士）的研修日誌》
data.detailed_description:
《我與她（護士）的研修日誌》是一款的小说游戏。

Feature


  • Smooth character animation via the E-mote system
  • reathtaking FHD illustrations

Story


“和竹馬護士開始的成人戀愛”

為了成為兒時夢想的醫生，邁開的第一步。
作為實習醫生到醫院赴任的那天，
主人公時隔幾年，遇到了已成為護士的青梅竹馬。

主人公一邊在醫院向作為前輩的她學習細節，
一邊度過了繁忙的實習生活。
有一天，主人公為了保護她，從樓梯上摔了下來。
右臂和左腳骨折的主人公，不得不暫時中斷實習，開始了住院生活。
而主人公入住的正是她所在的病房大樓。
看到骨折躺在床上的主人公，
她似乎覺得自己是罪魁禍首，非常沮喪。
為了讓她高興起來，主人公決定提出建議。

“要是你有空，如果能照顧我的話我會很開心的。”

“可以！”

就這樣，她——赤木澪，便開始以超越護士的職責照顧著主人公。

我作為實習醫生和她交織而成的醫院愛情故事，便開始了。

Character




赤木 澪（Akagi Mio）　CV：小野涼子（Ono Ryouko）

  • 身高：不到160cm
  • 體重：保密（因為護士的工作是力氣活，所以肌肉也不少哦……）
  • 三圍：請自行想像（微笑）
  • 胸圍：保密（F罩杯——出自同事護士）
  • 腰圍：保密（她竟然對我說她的腰圍不到60cm——出自同事護士）
  • 臀圍：保密（是個好生養的——出自產科醫生）
  • 血型：B型
  • 生日：8月31日
  • 星座：處女座

    本作的女主人公，從4年的護士學校畢業後，在本作舞臺的大學醫院工作了2年左右。
    因為性格認真開朗，所以深受歡迎的她被患者們親切地喚作“小澪”。
    在高中畢業後與青梅竹馬的主人公疏遠了一段時間。

    久別重逢後，主人公作為實習醫生來到了她所在的科室，既然是熟人，她便被吩咐帶一帶主人公。
    畢竟有了2年的經驗，工作非常出色，但有時也會有粗心大意的一面。

data.short_description: 《我與她（護士）的研修日誌》是一款的小说游戏。我作為實習醫生和她交織而成的醫院愛情故事，便開始了。“和竹馬護士開始的成人戀愛”
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows8.1/10/11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • 備註: Support Pixel Shaders 2.0 or higher required / A pointing device required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows8.1/10/11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT 1030
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • 備註: 1920x1080px or higher / Support Pixel Shaders 2.0 or higher required / A pointing device required

data.name: The 2nd page of the medical examination diary: Another story of exciting days of me and my senpai
data.detailed_description:
"The 2nd page of the medical examination diary: Another story of exciting days of me and my senpai" is the novel game.

Feature


  • Smooth character animation via the E-mote system
  • reathtaking FHD illustrations

Story


"The adult love with the nurse who is a childhood friend."

The first step to becoming a doctor, which was his dream.

On the day he was assigned to the hospital as a trainee doctor,
there the protagonist encountered his childhood friend,
who has become a nurse, for the first time in several years.

The protagonist spent his busy training days at the hospital,
learning the details from her, who is now his senior.

But one day, the protagonist fell down the stairs to protect her.

He broke his right arm and left leg,
temporarily interrupting his training and forced to rest in the hospital.

The room where he was treated was the wing where she was allocated.

Seeing the protagonist lying in bed with broken bones,
she looked depressed, as if she felt a responsibility for the incident.

To encourage her, the protagonist decided to make a suggestion.

"I'd be glad to have you take care of me when you're free..."

"Yes, I will!"

Thus, Akagi Mio began to take care of the protagonist beyond her duties as a nurse.

This is the love story between the resident doctor and the nurse at the hospital.

Character


Mio Aakagi CV:Ono Ryouko



  • Height: Barely 160cm
  • Weight: Censored (being a nurse is hard work so I gained a lot of muscle...)
  • B:W:H measurement: As you imagine (smirk)
  • Bust: Censored (Size F: From her colleague.)
  • Waist: Censored (Less than 60cm: From her colleague who was blagged.)
  • Hip: Cencored (The obstetrician said that I'm an easy childbearing type.)
  • Blood type: RH-B
  • Date of birth: 31 August
  • Zodiac sign: Virgo

    She is the heroine of this story.

    After graduating from a fourth-year nursing school,
    she has been working at the university hospital for about two years where the story takes place.

    She is so popular with patients that they call her "Mio chan"
    because of her good-natured, diligent, and cheerful character.

    After graduating from high school, she and the protagonist,
    a childhood friend, have been apart for some time.

    The reunion after a long time, the protagonist comes to her department for training,
    and she was assigned to follow up with him as an acquaintance.

    She has been working in the department for two years,
    so she is not a novice, but she also has a bit clumsy side that sometimes makes mistakes.

  • Processor: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • Additional Notes: Support Pixel Shaders 2.0 or higher required / A pointing device required
